data.title: Fix: recipe-engine-adapter contract files_changed path format not canonicalized
data.description: The contract specifies 'files_changed' must contain 'relative paths from repo root' but does not canonicalize the format. If one adapter emits './src/foo.ts' while another emits 'src/foo.ts', downstream consumers (logging, deduplication) may treat them as different files. The contract should specify: no leading './', forward-slash separated, no trailing slash. File: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
